title: Spinning Up in Deep RL
summary: We’re releasing Spinning Up in Deep RL, an educational resource designed to let anyone learn to become a skilled practitioner in deep reinforcement learning. Spinning Up consists of crystal-clear examples of RL code, educational exercises, documentation, and tutorials.
summaryZh: 我们即将发布《Spinning Up in Deep RL》，这是一款教育资源，旨在让任何人都能学习成为深度强化学习的熟练从业者。Spinning Up包括清晰的RL代码示例、教育练习、文档和教程。
highlights: We’re releasing Spinning Up in Deep RL, an educational resource designed to let anyone learn to become a skilled practitioner in deep reinforcement learning.
Spinning Up consists of crystal-clear examples of RL code, educational exercises, documentation, and tutorials.
highlightsZh: 我们即将发布《Spinning Up in Deep RL》，这是一款教育资源，旨在让任何人都能学习成为深度强化学习的熟练从业者。Spinning Up包括清晰的RL代码示例、教育练习、文档和教程。

title: Learning concepts with energy functions
titleZh: 具有能量函数的学习概念
summary: We’ve developed an energy-based model that can quickly learn to identify and generate instances of concepts, such as near, above, between, closest, and furthest, expressed as sets of 2d points. Our model learns these concepts after only five demonstrations. We also show cross-domain transfer: we use concepts learned in
summaryZh: 我们开发了一种基于能量的模型，可以快速学习识别和生成概念的实例，例如近、上、之间、最近和最远，以2d点的集合表示。我们的模型仅在五次演示后就学会了这些概念。我们还展示了跨域转移：我们使用在

titleZh: 在线规划，离线学习：通过基于模型的控制进行有效的学习和探索
